name: Ancient Warriors Saga - Defense of Changban
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>華</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>史</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>略</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゃく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>長</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>坂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>之</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>の</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>雄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Warring Flower Saga - Valiance at Changban
desc:
If your "Ancient Warriors" monster battles, your opponent cannot activate any Spell/Trap Cards until the end of the Damage Step. You can only use 1 of the following effects of "Ancient Warriors Saga - Defense of Changban" per turn, and only once that turn.
● At the start of your opponent's Battle Phase: You can send this face-up card from your Spell & Trap Zone to the GY; monsters your opponent controls cannot target "Ancient Warriors" monsters for attacks this turn.
● When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 "Ancient Warriors" monster from your Deck.
eff:
If your "Ancient Warriors" monster battles, your opponent cannot activate any Spell/Trap Cards until the end of the Damage Step. You can only use 1 of the following effects of "Ancient Warriors Saga - Defense of Changban" per turn, and only once that turn.
● At the start of your opponent's Battle Phase: You can send this face-up card from your Spell & Trap Zone to the GY; monsters your opponent controls cannot target "Ancient Warriors" monsters for attacks this turn.
● When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 "Ancient Warriors" monster from your Deck.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: At the start of the Battle Phase
